title: InputManager
description: Owns the unified input pipeline for an Application: keyboard events, pointer (mouse/touch/pen) events with multi-touch slot management, gamepad polling with mapping detection, mouse-wheel events, canvas-focus tracking, and high-level gesture recognition (pinch / rotate / long-press). All raw inputs are written into a shared `Float32Array` channel buffer. Bind input listeners via the onTrigger / onActive / onStart / onStop factory methods (or via Gamepad.onTrigger-style methods on individual pads), or subscribe to the signal-style notifications (`onKeyDown`, `onPointerDown`, `onGamepadConnected`, `onAnyGamepadButtonDown`, …). Driven each frame by Application.update; constructed automatically — you do not instantiate this class yourself.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Owns the unified input pipeline for an Application: keyboard events, pointer (mouse/touch/pen) events with multi-touch slot management, gamepad polling with mapping detection, mouse-wheel events, canvas-focus tracking, and high-level gesture recognition (pinch / rotate / long-press).

All raw inputs are written into a shared `Float32Array` channel buffer. Bind input listeners via the onTrigger / onActive / onStart / onStop factory methods (or via Gamepad.onTrigger-style methods on individual pads), or subscribe to the signal-style notifications (`onKeyDown`, `onPointerDown`, `onGamepadConnected`, `onAnyGamepadButtonDown`, …).
Driven each frame by Application.update; constructed automatically — you do not instantiate this class yourself.

members.name: getGamepad
members.description: Direct accessor for a single gamepad slot. Equivalent to app.input.gamepads[slot] but reads more clearly at call sites.

members.name: getPrimaryPointerPosition
members.description: Returns the canvas-relative position of the primary pointer (isPrimary = true), or the first non-cancelled pointer if no primary is found. Returns null when no active pointer is present. Used by debug layers to show cursor info.

members.name: onActive
members.signature: onActive(channel: InputChannel | readonly InputChannel[], callback: object, options?: InputBindingOptions): InputBinding
members.description: Register a callback fired every frame while any of channels is active.

members.name: onStart
members.signature: onStart(channel: InputChannel | readonly InputChannel[], callback: object, options?: InputBindingOptions): InputBinding
members.description: Register a callback fired once when any of channels becomes active. Manual lifecycle — call .unbind() on the returned binding to detach.

members.name: onStop
members.signature: onStop(channel: InputChannel | readonly InputChannel[], callback: object, options?: InputBindingOptions): InputBinding
members.description: Register a callback fired once when all of channels become inactive.

members.name: onTrigger
members.signature: onTrigger(channel: InputChannel | readonly InputChannel[], callback: object, options?: InputBindingOptions): InputBinding
members.description: Register a callback fired when the input is released within InputBindingOptions.threshold ms of activation (a "tap").

members.name: update
members.description: Per-frame entry point invoked by Application.update. Polls the gamepad API, drains queued keyboard/pointer/wheel deltas into the channel buffer, fires the corresponding Signals, then evaluates each registered binding.

members.name: connectedGamepadCount
members.description: Number of slots currently occupied by a physical gamepad.

members.name: connectedGamepads
members.description: Subset of gamepads containing only currently connected pads, in slot order.

members.name: firstConnectedGamepad
members.description: First connected gamepad in slot order, or null when no pads are attached.

members.name: gamepads
members.description: Always-4 array of Gamepad slot mailboxes. Each entry exists for the application's full lifetime; check pad.connected for hardware presence. Listeners attached to a slot survive disconnect/reconnect.

members.name: gamepadSlotStrategy
members.description: The slot strategy active for this InputManager.

members.name: hasGamepad
members.description: true when at least one slot is occupied by a physical gamepad.

members.name: onAnyGamepadAxisChange
members.description: Fires whenever any pad reports an axis value change.

members.name: onAnyGamepadButtonDown
members.description: Fires whenever any pad reports a button press transition.

members.name: onAnyGamepadButtonUp
members.description: Fires whenever any pad reports a button release transition.

members.name: onAnyGamepadReassigned
members.description: Fires when a 'compact'-strategy disconnect shifts a higher-numbered slot's pad into a lower one. Dispatched once per moved pad with the destination slot and the slot index it came from.

members.name: onGamepadConnected
members.description: Fires when a physical pad connects to any slot.

members.name: onGamepadDisconnected
members.description: Fires when a physical pad disconnects from any slot.

members.name: onLongPress
members.description: Fires when a pointer has been held without significant movement for ≥ 500 ms.

members.name: onPinch
members.description: Fires on every two-touch-pointer move where the distance between them changed. scale > 1 = spreading, < 1 = pinching.

members.name: onRotate
members.description: Fires on every two-touch-pointer move where the angle between them changed. angleDelta is in radians.
